notes: Tags are generated in English from icon identifiers and style variants.
They are designed for machine lookup, search, grouping, and semantic fallback.
Material variant tags preserve outlined, rounded, and sharp styles.
Cupertino variant tags preserve filled, circle, square, solid, and alternate styles.
